title: My First Day at College
snippet: What were my expectations about today?Well, yesterday I was really anxious about today. I thought I’d start the day with a Analytical Geometry class, at 7:30am. title: Hello World - Be Welcome
snippet: A new hello world.Hello, my dear visitor, be welcome. Today I’m starting a brand new project, my new blog. So, I thinkI have to present myself to you all.
